subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Qablí-Hasan! The Most Exalted Pen hath at all times been occupied with the remembrance of the friends. Praise be to God, the Light hath dawned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل حسن قلم اعلی در جمیع احیان بذکر دوستان مشغول الحمد لله نور مشرق و
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @many are called but few are chosen, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @love of God
